question: What are the first names of all buyers and what products did they buy? List them in pairs.
sql: SELECT Customers.customer_last_name, Products.product_name FROM Customers JOIN Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Orders.customer_id JOIN Order_Items ON Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id;

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取买家与购买产品的配对关系，但SQL描述中未明确关联逻辑（如JOIN条件），且列名可能混淆（customer_first_name通常指名字而非姓氏）
